{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Demon
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A demon in [[Latari Forest]] is said to catch innocent people and cut them up.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Demon]] is a rumored entity in the [[Latari Forest]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
